sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35618" key="e)/nqrhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνθρην-ος</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ος,</foreign> <sense id="n35618.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mournful,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνθυπήχησις</foreign> Schubart <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Papyruskunde</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
